title: Give It to Me

earnings.assumptions: Estimate reflects long-tail streaming and recurring recognition from one of Timbaland's biggest crossover records.

ownership.master_owner: Label-controlled master with featured-artist and producer participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears split across writers and producers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Inferred annual earnings range, not a published royalty breakdown.

meaning_summary: This track pairs a memorable hook with strong cultural recall, which helps explain its staying power and long-tail commercial value.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming remains the main long-tail driver for recognizable rap tracks.
Playlist placement and cultural recall help the song stay active.
Sampling, sync use, and short-form rediscovery can extend earnings.
